title: Vine Growth Tutorial
intendedTensionBeat: The vine preview shows a future cost if ignored.
intendedReleaseBeat: Clipping the warned vine preserves the route and makes the player feel ahead of the system.
expectedPath: Notice the vine warning, clear or clip vine before growth worsens the lane, then continue the rescue.
expectedFailMode: Player ignores the preview and lets the route become slower.
designNotes: The growth must feel warned, authored, and attributable.
